perturbation.original_text: This agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of the 15th day of December, 1997 ("Effective Date"), by and between Excite, Inc., a California corporation, located at 555 Broadway, Redwood City, California 94063 ("Excite"), and NetGrocer, Inc. a Delaware corporation, located at 333 Seventh avenue, 11th Floor, New York, NY 10001 ("NetGrocer").
perturbation.changed_text: This agreement ("Contract") is entered into as of the 15th day of December, 1997 ("Effective Date"), by and between Excite, Inc., a California corporation, located at 555 Broadway, Redwood City, California 94063 ("Excite"), and NetGrocer, Inc. a Delaware corporation, located at 333 Seventh avenue, 11th Floor, New York, NY 10001 ("NetGrocer").
perturbation.explanation: The term 'Agreement' is changed to 'Contract' in the definition. Throughout the document, the agreement is referenced as 'Agreement', which contradicts the initial definition if interpreted strictly. This creates uncertainty about whether all references to 'Agreement' should be read as 'Contract' and how previous references to 'Agreement' are to be interepreted.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1. SPONSORSHIP a) Excite will promote NetGrocer in the Excite Shopping Channel as follows: i) For the term of this Agreement, Excite will display a text and/or graphic link (consistent with the format used on similar links on the same page) to the NetGrocer Site on the Excite Shopping Channel main page. ii) Excite will display a text and/or graphic link (consistent with the format used on similar links on the same page) to the NetGrocer Site in the home page of the Excite Shopping Channel "Such a Deal" promotion in four separate one-week segments during each year of the term of the Agreement, once every calendar quarter. iii) Excite will display a text and/or graphic link (consistent with the format used on similar links on the same page) to the NetGrocer Site in the home page of the Excite Shopping Channel "Shop Here First" promotion in four separate one-week segments during the term of the Agreement, once every calendar quarter. Excite shall not display the link under this Section 1 (a)(iii) in the same weeks as the promotional link under Section 1 (a)(ii). iv) For the term of the Agreement, Excite will display a text and/or graphic link (consistent with the format listed on similar links on the same page) to the NetGrocer Site on the front page of the "Gourmet and Groceries" department of the Excite Shopping Channel. v) Excite will display a text and/or graphic link (consistent with the format used on similar links on the same page) to the NetGrocer Site in the "Shop Here First" promotion in the Gourmet and Groceries department of the Excite Shopping Channel for the term of the Agreement. Such link will be displayed as the left-most link or top-most link at least fifty percent (50%) of the time. vi) Excite currently plans to develop a coupon promotion area in the Excite Shopping Channel, tentatively called "Coupon Corner". When launched, Excite will display an advertising banner or text or graphic link (consistent with the format used on similar links on the same page) to the NetGrocer Site will Coupon Corner for the remainder of the term of the Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Agreement' to 'Contract' in the definition introduces a clear contradiction. The contradicted text refers to 'this Agreement,' creating uncertainty as to whether the referenced agreement is now the 'Contract' as defined. The definition has been changed but the contradicted text has not, creating a conflict and uncertainty as to which term to follow, thus the change causes a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: For the purposes of this Agreement, an "Impression" is defined as any link to the NetGrocer Site, whether graphic, text or any combination of graphic and text, served by Excite to a user as part of an HTML page, part of the Excite's Internet chat service or part of search results displayed in "Excite Shopping Service powered by Jango".
perturbation.changed_text: For the purposes of this Agreement, a "View" is defined as any link to the NetGrocer Site, whether graphic, text or any combination of graphic and text, served by Excite to a user as part of an HTML page, part of the Excite's Internet chat service or part of search results displayed in "Excite Shopping Service powered by Jango".
perturbation.explanation: The term 'Impression' is redefined as 'View'. The contract later uses 'Impression' without clarifying whether it means 'View', thus creating a contradiction. This affects the interpretation of impression counts and associated obligations.
perturbation.contradicted_text: e) Excite will use reasonable commercial efforts to deliver [*] "Impressions" of the promotional placements and advertising banners described in Sections 1 (a) - (d) in the first year of the term of the Agreement and to deliver [*] "Impressions" of the promotional placements and advertising banners described in Sections 1 (a) - (d) in the second year of the term of the Agreement. For the purposes of this Agreement, a "View" is defined as any link to the NetGrocer Site, whether graphic, text or any combination of graphic and text, served by Excite to a user as part of an HTML page, part of the Excite's Internet chat service or part of search results displayed in "Excite Shopping Service powered by Jango".
perturbation.justification: The original text defines 'Impression', while the changed text redefines 'Impression' as 'View'. The contradicted text then uses both 'Impressions' and 'View'. By redefining 'Impression' as 'View' in one section and using 'Impressions' in another, the contract creates ambiguity and contradiction, specifically falling under 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction' as the contract uses 'Impression' in section e) without clarifying whether it means 'View' after the redefinition. This directly impacts the interpretation and enforceability of Excite's obligations regarding impression counts.

perturbation.original_text: The term of this Agreement will begin on December 15, 1997 and will end the later of (i) December 15, 1999 or (ii) Excite's delivery of all of the guaranteed Click-throughs described in Section 1(f).
perturbation.changed_text: The duration of this Agreement will commence on December 15, 1997 and will conclude the later of (i) December 15, 1999 or (ii) Excite's delivery of all of the guaranteed Click-throughs described in Section 1(f).
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'term' to 'duration' in the definition of the agreement's lifespan introduces another layer of confusion. While seemingly synonymous, using both terms interchangeably later in the document without clarification could lead to disputes about the intended length of the agreement or the obligations during different periods. It causes ambiguity regarding when specific clauses related to the 'term' are applicable.
perturbation.contradicted_text: i) For the term of the Agreement, Excite will display a text and/or graphic link (consistent with the format used on similar links on the same page) to the NetGrocer Site on the Excite Shopping Channel main page. ii) Excite will display a text and/or graphic link (consistent with the format used on similar links on the same page) to the NetGrocer Site in the home page of the Excite Shopping Channel "Such a Deal" promotion in four separate one-week segments during each year of the term of the Agreement, once every calendar quarter. iii) Excite will display a text and/or graphic link (consistent with the format used on similar links on the same page) to the NetGrocer Site in the home page of the Excite Shopping Channel "Shop Here First" promotion in four separate one-week segments during the term of the Agreement, once every calendar quarter. Excite shall not display the link under this Section 1 (a)(iii) in the same weeks as the promotional link under Section 1 (a)(ii). iv) For the term of the Agreement, Excite will display a text and/or graphic link (consistent with the format listed on similar links on the same page) to the NetGrocer Site on the front page of the "Gourmet and Groceries" department of the Excite Shopping Channel.
perturbation.justification: The modified text introduces 'duration' as an alternative to 'term'. The contradicted text relies solely on 'term' to define obligations for Excite. This creates ambiguity as to whether the obligations outlined in the contradicted text apply during the 'duration' of the agreement if 'duration' and 'term' are not explicitly defined as synonyms. The lack of a consistent term creates a potential contradiction under the Misaligned Terminology definition. Thus, a strong in-text contradiction exists, according to the provided definition of Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction.
